creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
It appears the tarball has been rerolled:

=> libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz doesn't seem to exist in /distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://cgit.freedesktop.org/~aplattner/libvdpau/snapshot/libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz
fetch: http://cgit.freedesktop.org/~aplattner/libvdpau/snapshot/libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz: size unknown
fetch: http://cgit.freedesktop.org/~aplattner/libvdpau/snapshot/libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz: size of remote file is not known
libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz                                     -1  B    0  Bps
=> Fetched file size mismatch (expected 128324, actual 128380)
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/libvdpau-0.8.tar.xz: Requested Range Not Satisfiable
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /distfiles/ and try again.
